query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('definition', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'E42_12737238.a2l', 'a2l', 50331648, 'GM E42 L5P Gen 2 Duramax A2L - ECM_2023_E42 project, TriCore, 48MB', 'LOCKED ECU. Kory Denali. Full cal param defs for live tuning.'),

('training', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'Re-mappingcourse.pdf', 'pdf', 5000000, 'ECU remapping course - calibration techniques', 'Remapping methodology training'),
('strategy', 'bosch_mg1', 'MG1CS019', NULL, 'MG1StrategyBookST180.pdf', 'pdf', 50000000, 'Bosch MG1 strategy document ST180', 'Injection, boost, EGR, DPF, torque strategies'),

('reference', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', NULL, 'BCM_tuning_info.pdf', 'pdf', 500000, 'GM BCM tuning information', 'BCM tuning methodology'),
('reference', 'ford', 'P473', NULL, 'P473_Chassis_Cert.xls', 'xls', 500000, 'Ford P473 chassis cert release summary', 'Ford chassis cert data'),
('tool', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'TireSize_ShiftPointCalc.xls', 'xls', 100000, 'Tire size and shift point calculator', 'TODO: Convert to editor tool'),

('training', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'AdvancedEngineTroubleshooting.pdf', 'pdf', 5000000, 'Advanced engine performance troubleshooting', 'Diagnostic training');
